programmes.show_description: Ní mór do bheirt iomaitheoirí cúrsaí a chur ina gceart tar éis na comhairle. (Two castaways must mend fences after a wild tribal council.)
Súil siar ar Thiobraid Árann v Áth Cliath sa chúigiú babhta den tSraith Náisiúnta Iomána 2014. (Highlights from Tipperary v Dublin in Round 5 of the 2014 National Hurling League.)
Mórimeachtaí an lae ó Aonad Nuachta TG4. (The day's main news stories from a regional, national and international perspective.)
Tá babhta ceannais Réalta agus Gaolta buailte linn! Á chur i láthair ag Síomha Ní Ruairc. (It's the final of Réalta agus Gaolta! Presented by Síomha Ní Ruairc.)
Ní mó ná sásta atá Michelle le Cam ná le Vince mar gheall ar an méid a tharla le Dean. (Michelle is still displeased with Cam and Vince because of the mess with Dean.)
Tugann Pauline Scanlon cuairt ar theach tábhairne The Parrswood i Manchain sa gclár seo. (Pauline Scanlon visits The Parrswood in Manchester to hear a wealth of music.)

Is beag foighne a bhíonn ag Clúmh nuair a bhíonn ocras air! (A hungry Fluff is a persistent Fluff!)
Tá sé in am amhrán a chasadh faoi thochaltóir! (Let's have fun with the excavator song!)
Tá JJ agus Mochi an Moncaí ag dul ag snámh! (JJ and Mochi the Monkey are going for a swim!)
Beidh spraoi ag na Dathanna in éineacht leis na Clódóirí inniu. (Today, the Colours have fun with the Printing Crew.)
Tugann na páistí ar fad cuairt ar an Teach Dóiteáin. (All the children pay a visit to the Firehouse.)
Ní fonn ar bith ar Roy dul chuig an siopa, tá sé an-leadránach! (Roy doesn't want to go to the shop, it's so boring!)
Beidh Elmo ag foghlaim faoi ghruaig inniu. (Elmo is learning all about hair today.)
Beidh Elmo ag foghlaim faoi shíscéalta inniu. (Elmo is learning all about fairy tales today.)
Tugann Pip agus Posy faoi deara go mbíonn an-spraoi acu ag obair le chéile. (Pip and Posy realise that working together is much more fun than competing against each other.)
Níl a fhios ag na hOlobobanna céard a imreoidh siad. (No one can agree on what to play today.)
Imríonn Owlette cluiche an Ninja Oíche cé go molann Catboy agus Gekko di gan. (Catboy and Gekko tell Owlette not to play Night Ninja's game, but she does so anyway.)
Bíonn an-spraoi ag Wussywat agus a cairde sa sneachta go dtí go bhfeiceann sí fear sneachta Ird agus Ortus. (Wussywat has fun sledging in the snow.)
Téann Clifford agus Emily Eilís ag spaisteoireacht chun an míol mór bán a aimsiú. (Clifford and Emily Elizabeth go on an adventure to find the white whale.)
Féachann na cairde le rud éigin deas a dhéanamh d'Aintín ar a lá speisialta. (It's Aunty Pear Tree's special day and her friends are going to treat her.)
Titeann na Bananaraptair síos i bpoll. Caithfidh Ginger agus na Piseanna-Rex teacht i gcabhair orthu. (The Bananaraptors fall into a hole. Ginger and the Pea-Rexes must save them.)
Tá iasc órga Nev agus Dev tar éis bháis. (Nev and Dev's goldfish dies.)
Tá Ella agus a cairde ag iarraidh cluichí éagsúla a imirt le coileáinín. (Ella and her friends all want to play different games with a puppy.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Tagann fail ar Lola nuair a bhíonn sí ag cleachtadh do cheolchoirm na scoile. (Lola gets the hiccups when practising for the school concert.)
Tá Emma trína chéile go ndearna Jia dearmad castáil léi. (Emma gets upset about a forgotten play date but Jia thinks her friend is too sensitive for a hero.)
Tá deacracht ag Lola a haiste a scríobh mar nach gceapann sí gur mórán de laoch é Pat. (Lola struggles to write her essay as she doesn't think Pat is much of a hero.)
Is ag Angelo atá an phríomhpháirt i ndráma nua Burst. (Angelo must star in Burst's newest "play".)
Féachann Peigí le ceacht a mhúineadh do Shíle faoi chailíní. (Margaret tries to teach Susan why girls rule.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Amhrán géimiúil faoi bheith ag siúl taobh amuigh a bheidh againn inniu. (A fun song about going for a walk outside.)
Tá fail ar uimhir a Naoi inniu agus níl a fhios aige le fáil réidh leo! (Every time Numberblock Nine hiccups, he falls to pieces.)
Téann na Blocdathanna ar aistear ag féachaint ar dhathanna éagsúla. (The Colourblocks go on a journey of colour discovery.)
Tá damhsa nua ag Bó - Luascadh na Coillearnaí. (Cow is taught how to do a new dance - The Woodland Wiggle.)
Tá Agnes ag eagrú raifil & is turas i gciseán, suas sna clabhtaí, an chéad duais. (Agnes is organising a raffle with a trip to the clouds in basket, to be won as the first prize.)
Is í Tara Breathnach a bheidh ag léamh scéal an lae inniu. (Today's story of the day is read by Tara Breathnach.)
Cuireann sé as do Posy nuair a aimsíonn Pip duine níos cabhraí ná í féin. (Pip finds someone more helpful than Posy and has to make it up to her when he hurts her feelings.)
Tabharfaidh Helen agus na daltaí cuairt ar phláinéad Zaboosh inniu. (Helen and her students play at visiting Zaboosh's home planet.)
Cuireann Clóra caimiléireacht i leith Zaboosh i gcluiche atá siad a imirt. (Clóra accuses Zaboosh of cheating while playing a game.)

programmes.show_name: True agus Ríocht an Bhogha Ceatha
programmes.show_description: Tagann Rí an Bhogha Ceatha ar phlandaí atá i ndroch-chaoi agus é ar thóir mianta. (As The Rainbow King searches for wishes, he comes across plants that are in a very bad way.)
Samhlaíonn Ruarc a shaol ina phíolóta nuair a bheidh sé mór, le cúnamh ó Shióg na bPost. (Ruarc imagines his life as a pilot when he grows up, with the help of the Job Fairy.)
Is draoi é Daideo inniu ach teastaíonn cúnamh uaidh ó bheirt ridirí chun banríon na sióg a thabhairt slán. (Grandpa is a wizard but he needs the help of two brave knights.)
An mbeidh Deedee in ann cabhrú le Mewmew rith níos sciobtha? (Will Deedee be able to help Mewmew run a little faster today?)
Beidh moncaí atá in ann aithris a dhéanamh agus dhá bhéar a bhfuil an iomarca ar a n-aire acu ar chlár an lae inniu. (On today's show we have a monkey doing impressions.)

Tá cara le Sam ag iarraidh deireadh a chur le caidreamh Sam agus Diane. (Sam's friend hopes to put an end to Sam and Diane's relationship.)
Ceiliúradh ar amhráin a bhíodh againn ag éirí aníos. (Series which celebrates and takes a fresh look at the songs of our schooldays.)
Caithfidh Jessica oibriú go crua chun theacht ar an té a mharaigh airgeadaí ag salón áilleachta. (Jessica works hard to find the murderer of a financier at a beauty salon.)
Sraith ceoil thraidisiúnta nua ó Scoil Samhraidh Joe Mooney i nDroim Seanbhó. (This new traditional music series comes from the Joe Mooney Summer School in Drumshanbo.)

Beidh na Singalings ag tabhairt aghaidh ar an Artach inniu. (Today the Singalings are going to the Arctic.)
Is iomaí dath liath ann. (Today, we find out that there are lots of different shades of Grey.)
Tá Cory ag ceapadh nach dteastaíonn feighlí leanaí uaidh. (Cory thinks that he's too grown-up to be babysat by Caoimhe.)
